test_input: Build a landing page for dental practices in Newport Beach offering Google Ads management.
questions: Does the output include a vertical playbook lookup step before writing any code?
Is an Impeccable pass (distill/colorize/animate/delight) explicitly mentioned as mandatory?
Is GSD execution flow (discuss->plan->execute->verify) mentioned for builds over 200 lines?
Does the output include a case-studies/ check for relevant proof points?
Is the deployment checklist referenced before marking the build complete?
